emails.subject: EnronOnline Legal Due Diligence
emails.body: EnronOnline Legal Due Diligence David I am putting together the request for assistance from local counsel in Japan in preparation for opening up EnronOnline to Japanese counterparties. If you have a copy of the request you sent to MSJ when you started working on this for Australia it would be very helpful to me. I have what we've used in Europe but would be grateful for your thoughts as well. Thanks, Mark

emails.subject: EnronOnline Legal Due Diligence

emails.subject: Re: EnronOnline Legal Due Diligence
emails.body: Re: EnronOnline Legal Due Diligence Sorry for the delay. I have been out of the office for few days. Anyway attached is the request for advice. Hope it is of some help.I also enclosed the file note that I produced after our discussion last month. That proved very useful in focusing counsel in on the relevant issues.
